title: nauclea junghuhnii
intro: Nauclea junghuhnii, also known as Que Wei or Nauclea, is a plant species native to Southeast Asia, belonging to the family Rubiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antimalarial effects. The health benefits of Nauclea junghuhnii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate symptoms of malaria, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of Nauclea junghuhnii can be made into teas, infusions, or capsules, and it is also used in traditional remedies for its antiseptic and antipyretic properties.
